subject: [RESOURCES] Tune sm-onap overrides for service mesh
commit_message:
[RESOURCES] Tune sm-onap overrides for service mesh

Make sure unneeded components are disabled.

Issue-ID: OOM-2431
Signed-off-by: Maciej Wereski <m.wereski@partner.samsung.com>
